---
title: "CV"
---

You can download my CV here:

[Download my CV](files/Carolyn_Kroger_CV.pdf)

## Education

**Degree**, Field  
University Name, Year

**Degree**, Field  
University Name, Year

## Appointments

**Position Title**  
Institution, Year–Present

## Selected awards and honors

- Award or honor, Year
- Award or honor, Year

## Selected presentations

- Presentation title, Conference or venue, Year
- Presentation title, Conference or venue, Year
